case_title: ALASKA STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION VS. ADONICA-JO WADA

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WADA, ADONICA-JO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALASKA STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WADA, ADONICA-JO $82,285.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,395.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $224.50 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $86,904.50 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
